programs.title: Mythbusters: There's Your Problem!
programs.desc: An icy welcome awaits the MythBusters as they tackle myths surrounding all things frozen.

programs.title: Battlebots
programs.desc: Giantkiller End Game takes on Bloodsport in a very messy Main Event, and there's the first sight on the new Chomp which now weighs over 500 pounds.

programs.title: Merlin (UK)
programs.desc: The mighty citadel is buzzing in anticipation of the prince's birthday celebrations. But Arthur's old adversary, Odin, promises to ensure this is one party Camelot will never forget.

programs.title: Operation Ouch!
programs.desc: The Doctors reveal why you need different shaped teeth to eat your food safely… by wearing some very strange gnashers! And they find out what it’s like to be lifeguards in Operation Takeover. We catch up with Ouch Patients Kaden and Maisie, and Dr Chris joins the Royal Airforce to find out what it’s like to give emergency medical care to patients in the back of a plane which doubles as a mobile military hospital! Meanwhile in Accident & Emergency one patient arrives after a nasty biking accident, and another has a busted wrist.

programs.title: Operation Ouch! - Do Try This at Home
programs.desc: There's chaos in the kitchen lab as Baby LiLou joins the doctors to reveal why you need kneecaps. Find out how your knees work with a simple Do Try experiment!

programs.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programs.desc: Alya's big sister Nora gets akumatized into Anansi. Now a giant spider woman, she wants to show Alya how dangerous Paris can be. Ladybug and Cat Noir can't be flyweights if they want to stop her.
